title: Wither Infection
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0588a414a8afc1bce6f8701ae6ac5ad32f5d8538_0.webp)

Mod Description

The end is nigh... and it starts with the Wither.

Wither Apocalypse is a chaotic and apocalyptic Minecraft mod that drastically changes the way the Wither interacts with the world



Features:
Withers now attack all mobs
Once a mob dies to a wither it becomes another wither
